title: 100+ Payment Experts to Follow on LinkedIn
excerpt: Matera CEO, Carlos Netto, was recognized as the 10th most influential professional in the payments industry in the world, according to the "100+ Payment Experts to Follow on LinkedIn"
body:
Matera CEO, Carlos Netto, was recognized as the 10th most influential professional in the payments industry in the world, according to the "100+ Payment Experts to Follow on LinkedIn" ranking.

In addition to his contribution as co-creator of Pix, Carlos Netto continues to represent Brazil in international discussions, including initiatives to standardize QR Codes for instant payments in the United States. This achievement reinforces Matera's role as a benchmark in financial technology, reflecting our commitment to delivering secure, robust and innovative solutions that drive the future of the financial industry.

View the full list [here](https://norbr.notion.site/36b1e100ef6d4613851d45a1c84e69dd?v=112db7fb49e4805a8e86000c70569eac).
